faqs.question: What pests are covered in general pest control service in Fresh Meadows?
faqs.answer: Our general pest control service covers common Fresh Meadows pests including ants, cockroaches, spiders, silverfish, earwigs, centipedes, and occasional invaders. We provide comprehensive interior and exterior treatments to create a protective barrier around your property.

faqs.question: How often should Fresh Meadows homes receive pest control treatment?
faqs.answer: We recommend quarterly treatments (every 3 months) for optimal protection in Fresh Meadows. Queens' seasonal weather changes bring different pest pressures throughout the year, and regular service ensures continuous protection and prevents infestations before they start.

faqs.question: Is your pest control treatment safe for children and pets in Fresh Meadows homes?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and employ Integrated Pest Management techniques that prioritize safety. Our technicians are trained to apply treatments strategically, and we provide clear instructions on any necessary precautions, typically allowing re-entry within 2-4 hours of treatment.
